title: Craftable Gunpowder
body:
# Craftable Gunpowder
### The Beginning
A while ago I played a custom Modpack with my friends and created this Datapackt using MCreator to balance it a bit. _Idk why but I remember needing a ton of gunpowder for something._
### Modrinth
I then uploaded it to Modrinth and didn't really care about it after I no longer used it.
It did somehow get a lot of downloads (and this didn't change to this day even tho it broke with a newer update).
### Trying to learn how to code
I want to learn how to propperly create or code data-/texturepacks, mods, plugins, etc. in the near future so if you have suggestions for an easy project or any tips then feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/nxCewF93C7) and open a ticket.
